channel.title: PR Primespot – U.S. Breaking News, Politics and Business
channel.description: Stay updated with U.S. breaking news, politics, business, tech, and investigations, with real-time coverage, trusted analysis, and essential daily insights

item.title: Stock Markets Edge Higher on Earnings, Tech Gains and Global Macro Signals
item.description:
U.S. markets ticked higher, led by technology gains and supportive futures, while global markets reacted to China policy cues and macroeconomic developments, pushing stocks ahead on Monday
Read the full article: https://www.prprimespot.com/business/stock-market-today-monday-june-29-2026
